title: Easier Smooth Stone Crafting
description: Are you ever frustrated going through the pain to make Smooth Stone? Well no more with Easier Smooth Stone Crafting! With this mod you can make Smooth Stone using only Cobblestone and a Stonecutter.
body:
## What the Mod adds

This mod adds a crafting recipe to make Smooth Stone out of Cobblestone. You can make make the Smooth Stone with the Stonecutter.

![Turn Cobblestone to Smooth Stone Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22206d905f4e189fc58e93513bd233202dd8e8da.png)

![Turn Cobblestone to Smooth Stone ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb7d14bd25c1c7c2b4b95d81da86c7b220c9fb07.png)

## Purpose of the mod

This mod should make it easier to craft Smooth Stone and not be frustrated with Smelting.
